title: AI Canvas HTML Validation Output (v1)
description: Output of htmlValidationService when run against one candidate HTML output from the Generator. Drives Pre-Judge filter decisions (hard violators dropped) and surfaces warnings in the spec preview. One artifact per (aiCanvasArtifactId, candidateIndex).

candidate_index.description: Index into AiCanvasArtifact.candidates[] this validation row covers.

parse_ok.description: false = cheerio failed to parse the HTML. Hard fail — Pre-Judge filter drops this candidate.

locator.description: OPTIONAL CSS selector or DOM hint pointing at the offending element

hard_violations.description: Subset of warnings.code values that trigger Pre-Judge drop. Stable enum: 'parse_failed', 'no_html', 'no_body', 'has_script', 'image_404_critical', 'proof_strategy_unsupported'.

failed.description: URLs that returned non-2xx on HEAD request

pass_aa.description: WCAG AA threshold — 4.5:1 normal text, 3:1 large text

overflow.description: true when post-render document height/width exceeds the expected viewport — text or element clipped
